title: lathyrus brachypterus subsp. haussknechtii
intro: Lathyrus brachypterus subsp. haussknechtii is a subspecies of the annual vetchling plant, which is a member of the pea family (Fabaceae) and native to the Balkan Peninsula. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a diuretic and to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus brachypterus subsp. haussknechtii include its potential to help with kidney issues, urinary problems, and to reduce oxidative stress in the body. Herbal preparations of the plant may include teas, infusions, and decoctions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
